moments.title: The Open Championship Reaches Climax
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship concludes today at Royal Birkdale Golf Club, with the world's top golfers battling for the coveted Claret Jug.

angles.name: Final Day Drama
angles.copy: It all comes down to this! Who will be crowned Champion Golfer of the Year at Royal Birkdale? The final round of The Open Championship is underway. #TheOpen

angles.name: Claret Jug Moment
angles.copy: History in the making! The 154th Open Championship concludes today. Tune in for all the drama as a new champion is etched into golf legend.

moments.title: Tour de France Heads Towards Final Week
moments.blurb: The 113th Tour de France continues its challenging route from Barcelona to Paris, with cyclists battling through various terrains before the final stage on July 26.

angles.name: Race Update
angles.copy: The yellow jersey battle intensifies! The Tour de France is heading into its thrilling final week, with every pedal stroke crucial. Who are you backing?

angles.name: Cycling Action
angles.copy: From the Pyrenees to the Alps, the Tour de France is delivering incredible action. Catch up on the latest from the world's biggest cycling race.

moments.title: Love Island UK Drama Continues
moments.blurb: The 13th series of Love Island UK, hosted by Maya Jama, is well underway, bringing daily dose of villa drama and recouplings on ITV2 and ITVX.

angles.name: Villa Latest
angles.copy: Another day, another dose of Love Island drama! What's been the biggest shocker from the villa this week? 👀

angles.name: Tonight's Episode
angles.copy: Get ready for more 'muggy' moments and 'my type on paper' chat! Love Island UK is back tonight for another essential watch.

moments.title: Glasgow Prepares for Commonwealth Games
moments.blurb: Glasgow is gearing up to host the 2026 Commonwealth Games, which kick off on July 23 and run until August 3, featuring 10 sports and a para sports programme.

angles.name: Countdown to Games
angles.copy: The countdown is ON! Glasgow is about to welcome athletes from across the Commonwealth for the 2026 Games, starting this Thursday. Get ready for some incredible sport!

angles.name: UK Sporting Highlight
angles.copy: Excitement is building for the Commonwealth Games in Glasgow! It's going to be an unmissable summer of sport.

moments.title: Latitude Festival Returns to Suffolk
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival is set to celebrate its 20th anniversary at Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23-26, promising a weekend of music, arts, and comedy.

angles.name: Festival Prep
angles.copy: Who's ready for Latitude?! The iconic Suffolk festival kicks off on Thursday, celebrating 20 years of music, laughs and magic at Henham Park. 🎉

angles.name: Line-up Hype
angles.copy: The stage is set! Latitude Festival is just days away, bringing a diverse line-up to Henham Park. What acts are you most excited to see?

moments.title: Splendour Festival's Last Dance
moments.blurb: Nottingham's Splendour Festival concludes today at Wollaton Hall & Deer Park, marking its final ever event after 18 years.

angles.name: Emotional Farewell
angles.copy: It's the end of an era! Splendour Festival waves goodbye today after 18 incredible years. Who's there for the final ever dance? 😢

angles.name: Nottingham Pride
angles.copy: Nottingham's biggest festival, Splendour, has its final day today. What are your favourite memories from Wollaton Hall over the years?

moments.title: Big Love Festival Wraps Up in Wales
moments.blurb: The Big Love Festival, a music and arts event in the Welsh countryside featuring over 130 acts, concludes today after a weekend of diverse performances and family activities.

angles.name: Welsh Festival Vibes
angles.copy: It's the final day of Big Love Festival in the beautiful Welsh countryside! What an incredible weekend of music, arts and good vibes. 🎉

angles.name: Weekend Recap
angles.copy: Did you make it to Big Love Festival this weekend? The Welsh countryside was alive with music and fun, wrapping up today!

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday, Brian May!
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist and songwriter, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Sending huge birthday wishes to the one and only Brian May! 🎸 The Queen legend turns 79 today. What's your favourite May riff?

angles.name: Queen Icon
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to Queen's iconic guitarist, Brian May! An absolute rock legend responsible for some of music's most unforgettable moments.

moments.title: Happy 80th Birthday, Alan Gorrie!
moments.blurb: Alan Gorrie, co-founder, bassist, and vocalist of the Average White Band, celebrates his 80th birthday today.

angles.name: Funk & Soul Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 80th Birthday to the incredible Alan Gorrie of Average White Band! Get those funk grooves on today. 🎶

angles.name: Scottish Music Legend
angles.copy: Happy 80th to Scottish music legend Alan Gorrie, co-founder of the Average White Band! Still bringing the soul.

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday, Carlos Santana!
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana, known for his unique blend of rock, blues, and Latin rhythms, celebrates his 79th birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the one and only Carlos Santana turns 79! Get ready to celebrate a true guitar icon. 🎸 What's your favourite Santana track?

angles.name: Musical Influence
angles.copy: A huge Happy Birthday loading for Carlos Santana tomorrow! His influence on music is immeasurable. Which song defines him for you?

moments.title: Happy 81st Birthday, Kim Carnes!
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Kim Carnes, best known for her iconic hit 'Bette Davis Eyes', celebrates her 81st birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: 80s Pop Icon
angles.copy: Tomorrow we're wishing a very Happy 81st Birthday to the distinctive voice behind 'Bette Davis Eyes', Kim Carnes! Still sounds incredible.

angles.name: Timeless Voice
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate Kim Carnes' 81st birthday tomorrow! Her timeless hits continue to captivate audiences.

moments.title: Happy 78th Birthday, Yusuf / Cat Stevens!
moments.blurb: Influential singer-songwriter Yusuf Islam, widely known as Cat Stevens, celebrates his 78th birthday on Tuesday.

angles.name: Folk Legend
angles.copy: On Tuesday, we're wishing a very Happy 78th Birthday to the legendary Yusuf Islam, aka Cat Stevens! Which of his classics is your go-to?

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: Happy 78th Birthday to the iconic Cat Stevens on Tuesday! His music has touched generations.

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday, Don Henley!
moments.blurb: The Eagles' co-founder, drummer, and vocalist Don Henley celebrates his 79th birthday on Wednesday.

angles.name: Eagles Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a massive Happy 79th Birthday to The Eagles' legendary Don Henley on Wednesday! What's your favourite Henley-penned hit?

angles.name: Rock & Roll Hall of Famer
angles.copy: Happy 79th to the voice of so many anthems, Don Henley, on Wednesday! Celebrate his incredible career.

moments.title: Happy 65th Birthday, Martin Gore!
moments.blurb: Depeche Mode's principal songwriter, guitarist, and keyboardist Martin Gore celebrates his 65th birthday on Thursday.

angles.name: Synth-Pop Mastermind
angles.copy: Happy 65th Birthday to Depeche Mode's songwriting genius, Martin Gore, this Thursday! His sound defined a generation. 🎹

angles.name: Depeche Mode Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a fantastic 65th Birthday to Martin Gore on Thursday! The creative force behind so many Depeche Mode classics.

moments.title: Happy 75th Birthday, Verdine White!
moments.blurb: Verdine White, the dynamic bassist and a founding member of Earth, Wind & Fire, celebrates his 75th birthday on Saturday.

angles.name: Funk Bass Legend
angles.copy: Get ready to groove! Verdine White of Earth, Wind & Fire turns 75 on Saturday! His basslines are legendary. 🕺

angles.name: Earth, Wind & Fire
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the iconic Verdine White this Saturday! Celebrate the incredible music of Earth, Wind & Fire.

moments.title: Happy 83rd Birthday, Mick Jagger!
moments.blurb: The Rolling Stones' legendary frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday next Sunday.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Royalty
angles.copy: Next Sunday, the incomparable Mick Jagger turns 83! Celebrate the eternal energy of The Rolling Stones' frontman. 🎤

angles.name: Stones Icon
angles.copy: Happy 83rd Birthday to rock legend Mick Jagger next Sunday! What's your favourite Rolling Stones track to get you moving?

moments.title: Happy 77th Birthday, Roger Taylor!
moments.blurb: Queen's dynamic drummer and a key songwriter, Roger Taylor, celebrates his 77th birthday next Sunday.

angles.name: Drumming Legend
angles.copy: Sending huge birthday wishes to Queen's drumming powerhouse, Roger Taylor, who turns 77 next Sunday! 🥁

angles.name: Queen's Beat
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to the iconic Roger Taylor next Sunday! The beat behind some of Queen's greatest hits.

moments.title: Happy 85th Birthday, Darlene Love!
moments.blurb: The legendary singer and actress Darlene Love, known for her powerful vocals and hits like 'Christmas (Baby Please Come Home)', celebrates her 85th birthday next Sunday.

angles.name: Vocal Powerhouse
angles.copy: Next Sunday, we celebrate the 85th Birthday of the phenomenal Darlene Love! A true icon with an incredible voice. 🌟

angles.name: Wall of Sound
angles.copy: Happy 85th to the legendary Darlene Love next Sunday! Her contributions to music are immense.

moments.title: Happy 33rd Birthday, Taylor Momsen!
moments.blurb: Singer and actress Taylor Momsen, frontwoman of The Pretty Reckless, celebrates her 33rd birthday next Sunday.

angles.name: Rock Star Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a Happy 33rd Birthday to The Pretty Reckless' awesome frontwoman, Taylor Momsen, next Sunday! 🤘

angles.name: Modern Rock Voice
angles.copy: Happy 33rd Birthday to the talented Taylor Momsen next Sunday! From acting to rocking stages, she does it all.
